source_pr.title: expression: fix `reverse` function on `bit type column`
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #49566,  close #50850, close #50855

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

1. Call [Coercibility](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/9b0fd9ea299266da70456f6e6077ed14bd191cfc/pkg/expression/collation.go#L373C16-L373C16)
2. Above will set default [Coercibility](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/9b0fd9ea299266da70456f6e6077ed14bd191cfc/pkg/expression/column.go#L710C2-L710C2)
3. Check `CoercibilityNumeric `  and reset [Collation ](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/9b0fd9ea299266da70456f6e6077ed14bd191cfc/pkg/expression/collation.go#L313C51-L313C51)
4. Then [IsBinaryStr](https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/blob/9b0fd9ea299266da70456f6e6077ed14bd191cfc/pkg/expression/builtin_string.go#L771) will return false, error occurs.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [x] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: select hex(col), hex(reverse(col)) from t order by reverse(col); (tests/integrationtest/r/expression/builtin.result)
failure_signature: select hex(col), hex(reverse(col)) from t order by reverse(col); (tests/integrationtest/r/expression/builtin.result)
root_cause_explanation: This PR mainly fixes reverse() behavior for BIT columns (collation/casting handling). From the PR diff alone there isn't a clear flaky/non-deterministic trigger for the integration test (it already uses ORDER BY), so we mark it as insufficient_evidence and avoid guessing a root cause.
fix_pattern: Fix reverse() handling for BIT columns by treating BIT as binary in collation/casting and reverse signature selection

evidence: evidence: select hex(col), hex(reverse(col)) from t order by reverse(col); (tests/integrationtest/r/expression/builtin.result)
